name: @jeswr/kernel-e1-prep
description: E1 core-freezing-experiment prep (docs/poc-design.md Phase E, E1): mapper-lexicon artifact, kernel/control vector tables at d_model=512 (kot-enc-Bq/1), cloze template-type inventory + held-out split, and tests. The GPU-side pipeline/trainer/eval live in pipeline/, train/, eval/ (python).

scripts.lexicon: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/lexiconArtifact.js
scripts.vectors: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/vectorTables.js
scripts.templates: npm run build && nice -n 10 node dist/harness/templates.js
scripts.inputs: npm run lexicon && npm run vectors && npm run templates
scripts.test: npm run build && nice -n 10 node --test dist/test/*.test.js
